case_title: SANTOS ROMERO VS. WILL YOMARI HERNANDEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-19-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-19-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF SANTOS ROMERO IS PRESENT. ASSITED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE. DEFENDANT WILL YOMARI HERNANDEZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUEST TO DISMISS DEFENDANT TANIA MARIA HERNANDEZ ROCHA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROMERO, SANTOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, WILL YOMARI $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST TANIA MARIA HERNANDEZ ROCHA IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY WILL YOMARI HERNANDEZ, TANIA MARIA HERNANDEZ ROCHA ON MAY-31-2017 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF SANTOS ROMERO IS PRESENT. ASSITED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL JACOB. DEFENDANT WILL YOMARI HERNANDEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
